issues.description: DSL is missing the second effect entirely. Card has two distinct effects: (1) passive cost boost, and (2) triggered ability when DON!! cards are returned. Only the first effect is partially represented.

First effect trigger should be 'Activated' only if it represents a cost/passive ability. The '[DON!! x1]' notation indicates this is an activation cost, not a triggered effect. Should use appropriate structure for cost-based passive effects or reconsider trigger model.
PowerBoost with amount=100 is incorrect. '+1 cost' is not a power boost. This should use a different action type or custom property to represent increased cost.

Missing entire second effect: 'When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active, and add up to 1 additional DON!! card and rest it.' Requires trigger on DON!! return condition, with GiveDon actions.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] All of your Characters gain +1 cost. [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active, and add up to 1 additional DON!! card and rest it.

effects.description: When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck
